description: 37 patches across FolderSync, Hidrate Spark, Meetup, Met Office, Tinder, and X, plus universal PairIP license-check bypass and universal OneTrust consent-banner auto-reject. v1.0.3 adds a Meetup patch to remove the 'Powered by Rokt' third-party offer popups (mParticle RoktKit.execute), and two default-off umbrella toggles ('Disable all Tinder paywalls & ads', 'Disable all Meetup paywalls') that apply every safe monetization patch from a single selection. Purchase-breaking Tinder paywall patches, the umbrellas, and the native-PairIP-blocked X (12.4.1) patches are default-off.
